Class AnnotationSpecificationItemViewModel

Namespace
AccoRevit.Addin.ModelViews
Assembly
AccoRevit.Addin.dll

View model representing a single annotation/tag specification row in the annotation configuration editor.

public class AnnotationSpecificationItemViewModel : ViewModelBase, INotifyPropertyChanged, IViewModel

object
ViewModelBase
AnnotationSpecificationItemViewModel

ReflectionUtils.SetPropertyValue(object, PropertyInfo, object)
SystemExtensions.Cast<T>(object)

Remarks

Wraps AnnotationSpecificationData with UI-friendly properties and helper behaviors:

  • Maintains a selectable list of family types in AvailableFamilyTypes.
  • Normalizes and synchronizes Category and RevitCategory using AnnotationCategoryMap.
  • Provides a computed display string for resolved family paths via ResolvedFamilyPathDisplay.

Constructors

AnnotationSpecificationItemViewModel() 

public AnnotationSpecificationItemViewModel()

Fields

AutoDetectTypeName

Sentinel type name indicating that the family type should be determined automatically at runtime.

public const string AutoDetectTypeName = "(Autodetect)"

Field Value

string

Properties

AnnotationFamilyFilePath

Resolved full file path to the family file (.rfa), if known.

public string AnnotationFamilyFilePath { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Remarks

When changed, also updates AnnotationFamilyFilePathValue and notifies ResolvedFamilyPathDisplay.

AnnotationFamilyFilePathValue

Legacy/display value for the family file path stored in the XML.

public string AnnotationFamilyFilePathValue { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Remarks

This is kept in sync with AnnotationFamilyFilePath during edits and is persisted to the model during save.

AnnotationFamilyName

Name of the annotation family (typically the family file name without extension).

public string AnnotationFamilyName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Remarks

When changed, resets AvailableFamilyTypes and ensures AnnotationFamilyType is not empty (defaults to AutoDetectTypeName).

AnnotationFamilyType

Selected family type name within the family (e.g., a FamilySymbol name), or AutoDetectTypeName.

public string AnnotationFamilyType { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Remarks

Setter normalizes null/whitespace values to AutoDetectTypeName.

AvailableFamilyTypes

List of selectable family types for the current family, including AutoDetectTypeName.

public ObservableCollection<string> AvailableFamilyTypes { get; }

Property Value

ObservableCollection<string>

Category

Logical category token used by the annotation configuration (e.g., "MEPFabricationPipework").

public string Category { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Remarks

When set, attempts to keep RevitCategory synchronized using AnnotationCategoryMap. Synchronization is suppressed during internal updates to avoid recursion.

PlacementPosition

Placement position token (e.g., "AboveCenter") used by the tagging placement logic.

public string PlacementPosition { get; set; }

Property Value

string

ResolvedFamilyPathDisplay

Gets a UI-friendly display value indicating whether the family path is resolved.

public string ResolvedFamilyPathDisplay { get; }

Property Value

string

RevitCategory

Revit category token (typically a string representation of a BuiltInCategory), persisted in the configuration.

public string RevitCategory { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Remarks

When set, attempts to keep Category synchronized using AnnotationCategoryMap. Synchronization is suppressed during internal updates to avoid recursion.

ServiceType

Optional fabrication service type name used to further constrain rule applicability.

public string ServiceType { get; set; }

Property Value

string

ShowLeader

Gets or sets whether the tag should be placed with a leader.

public bool ShowLeader { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

TagType

Tag type token (e.g., "NumberTag", "SizeTag") used to select the tagging behavior/rules.

public string TagType { get; set; }

Property Value

string

XOffset

X offset value (XML units) applied to the tag placement.

public double XOffset { get; set; }

Property Value

double

YOffset

Y offset value (XML units) applied to the tag placement.

public double YOffset { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Methods

Clone()

Creates a deep copy of this item by round-tripping through the model representation.

public AnnotationSpecificationItemViewModel Clone()

Returns

AnnotationSpecificationItemViewModel

A cloned view model.

FromModel(AnnotationSpecificationData)

Creates a view model from a persisted AnnotationSpecificationData model, normalizing category pairs.

public static AnnotationSpecificationItemViewModel FromModel(AnnotationSpecificationData model)

Parameters

model AnnotationSpecificationData

The model data loaded from configuration.

Returns

AnnotationSpecificationItemViewModel

A populated view model instance.

Remarks

Normalizes and reconciles Category and RevitCategory using AnnotationCategoryMap so that both fields remain consistent even when one side is missing or outdated.

ResetAvailableFamilyTypes()

Resets AvailableFamilyTypes to contain only AutoDetectTypeName and (optionally) the current type.

public void ResetAvailableFamilyTypes()

Remarks

This preserves a user-entered/loaded type name even when the family file has not been resolved yet, preventing the UI from dropping the current selection.

SetAvailableFamilyTypes(IEnumerable<string>)

Replaces AvailableFamilyTypes with the provided type names and preserves the current selection when necessary.

public void SetAvailableFamilyTypes(IEnumerable<string> typeNames)

Parameters

typeNames IEnumerable<string>

Type names to populate, typically extracted from the family document's symbols.

Remarks

Ensures AutoDetectTypeName is always present, de-duplicates and sorts input, and appends the current type if it is not present in the provided list.

ToModel()

Converts this view model into a persisted AnnotationSpecificationData model suitable for XML serialization.

public AnnotationSpecificationData ToModel()

Returns

AnnotationSpecificationData

A model instance populated from the current view model state.

Remarks

Normalizes and reconciles Category and RevitCategory before writing. Also updates AnnotationFamilyFilePathValue to match AnnotationFamilyFilePath.
